name: borrower-corporate
rationale: Corporation as borrower (e.g., holding company refinancing investment property). Vienna has no precedent for corporate-borrower canonical_map shape. Fixture uses existing borrower_name field with corporate entity name + extraText documenting corporate-specific attributes (incorporation jurisdiction, directors/officers, beneficial owners for AML/PEP). Layer 3: does canonical_map need new fields (incorporation_jurisdiction, beneficial_owners[], directors[]) or can existing fields accommodate? ARCHITECTURE-AMENDMENT-RISK item per Porter framing.
notes: Single-event sequence. Fixture uses existing canonical fields with corporate-style content; Layer 3 spec authoring + potential Phase 1 matrix amendment if existing fields insufficient. ARCHITECTURE-AMENDMENT-SIGNAL surfaced via Phase 5 triage.
